title: gladiolus hanryi
intro: Gladiolus hanryi, also known as the Yellow Corn Flag, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Iridaceae family and is native to southern Africa. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial compounds, which can be used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Gladiolus hanryi include reducing inflammation, fighting infections, and improving digestion, making it a valuable herb in herbal medicine. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, and is also used in traditional remedies, such as treating wounds and skin conditions.
